default.description: Diatom chrome capabilities — applies ONLY to the diatom:// origin (index.html and ui/*.html). Third-party web content loaded in the WebView cannot call any of these IPC commands.

webview-content.description: Capability set for third-party web content loaded in the main WebView. Intentionally grants ZERO IPC permissions. Even if a page attempts to call window.__TAURI__.invoke(), every command will be rejected. This is the security boundary between Diatom chrome (trusted) and arbitrary web content (untrusted). Tauri 2.0 enforces this via origin-based capability matching: the 'default' capability applies to asset:// / diatom:// origins; this capability (no permissions) applies to all other origins.
